title: ICICI Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
